title: troximon australe
intro: Troximon australe, also known as New Zealand troximon, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Māori medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Troximon australe are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
